gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while career counselors also remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, as dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
